```python
def next_permutation(xs):
    # Find the largest index i such that xs[i] < xs[i+1]
    i = len(xs) - 2
    while i >= 0 and xs[i] >= xs[i+1]:
        i -= 1
    if i < 0:
        # Last permutation: reverse whole list
        xs.reverse()
        return
    # Find the largest index j > i such that xs[j] > xs[i]
    j = len(xs) - 1
    while xs[j] <= xs[i]:
        j -= 1
    # Swap xs[i] and xs[j]
    xs[i], xs[j] = xs[j], xs[i]
    # Reverse the suffix starting at i+1
    left, right = i + 1, len(xs) - 1
    while left < right:
        xs[left], xs[right] = xs[right], xs[left]
        left += 1
        right -= 1
```
